notes: Sample inspektera evaluation report for regression testing WARN/FAIL citation enforcement. Every WARN/FAIL row carries a valid file:line citation or not-applicable reason. WARN rows with file:line citations include verify_command that reproduces evidence at the cited line.

rows.criterion: GIVEN CHANGELOG header WHEN inspected THEN title line is present
rows.evidence: CHANGELOG.md opens with the expected title heading.

rows.criterion: GIVEN TODO open-count claim WHEN re-verified THEN matches grep output
rows.evidence: Open checkbox count is 12 per grep.

rows.criterion: GIVEN progress schema WHEN inspected THEN commit field absent
rows.evidence: progress.yaml schema no longer defines a per-cycle commit field.

rows.criterion: GIVEN runtime-only metric WHEN no file anchor exists THEN not-applicable is allowed
rows.evidence: Stale installed-app marker is runtime state without a repo file anchor.
rows.citation: not-applicable: installed-app version drift is runtime state without a stable repo file anchor
